name: Mock Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup celery stalks with leaves, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare the rutabaga and cut into 4 pieces.
2. Cook in boiling water until tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Drain well and cool.
4. Dice the cooled rutabaga (approximately 2 1/2 cups).
5. Place diced vegetable in a salad bowl.
6. Sprinkle with sugar substitute and lemon juice.
7. Add scallions, pickle, celery, paprika, and mayonnaise.
8. Toss all well.
9. Fold in chopped eggs.
10. Chill well before serving.
